# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04/01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "RemoteDevTeam-NSG",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group for remote development team access"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the NSG resource"
      }
    },
    "allowedSourceAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0.0.0.0/0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "CIDR range for allowed source addresses. IMPORTANT: Restrict this to your team's known IP ranges in production (e.g., corporate VPN CIDR). Using 0.0.0.0/0 is NOT recommended for production environments."
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Development",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Development",
        "Staging",
        "Production"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Deployment environment tag"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "nsgDiagnosticsName": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '-diagnostics')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "Environment": "[parameters('environment')]",
        "Purpose": "Remote Development Team Access",
        "SecurityReview": "Required - Verify source IP restrictions before production use",
        "ManagedBy": "ARM Template"
      },
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH access for remote development team. Restrict sourceAddressPrefix to known IPs in production.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP access for remote development team. Restrict sourceAddressPrefix to known IPs in production. Consider using Azure Bastion instead.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1100,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP access for web application development and testing.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1200,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS access for secure web application development and testing.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1300,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Explicit deny-all rule for any traffic not matching above rules. Defense-in-depth measure.",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-VNet-Outbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound traffic within the virtual network.",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-Internet-Outbound-HTTPS",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound HTTPS for package managers, updates, and cloud service access.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1100,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-Internet-Outbound-HTTP",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound HTTP for package managers and updates.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1200,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-DNS-Outbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow outbound DNS resolution.",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "53",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1300,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Outbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Explicit deny-all outbound rule for traffic not matching above rules. Prevents data exfiltration.",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Outbound",
              "sourcePortRanges": [],
              "destinationPortRanges": [],
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": [],
              "destinationAddressPrefixes": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    },
    "securityWarning": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[if(equals(parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix'), '0.0.0.0/0'), 'WARNING: NSG is configured with 0.0.0.0/0 source access. This exposes RDP/SSH to the entire internet. For production, restrict to known IP ranges, use Azure Bastion, JIT VM access, or VPN Gateway.', 'Source IP restriction is applied. Verify the CIDR range covers all required team members.')]"
    },
    "securityRecommendations": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": [
        "1. Replace 0.0.0.0/0 with specific team IP ranges or corporate VPN CIDR blocks",
        "2. Enable Azure Bastion for secure RDP/SSH without public IP exposure",
        "3. Enable Just-In-Time (JIT) VM access via Microsoft Defender for Cloud",
        "4. Enable NSG Flow Logs for traffic auditing and anomaly detection",
        "5. Integrate with Azure VPN Gateway or ExpressRoute for private connectivity",
        "6. Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud network security recommendations",
        "7. Use Azure Firewall for centralized network traffic filtering",
        "8. Enforce MFA on all remote access accounts via Azure AD Conditional Access"
      ]
    }
  }
}
